message:
feat(region): formalize admission control correctness + concurrency docs (bd-ecp8u)

Add concurrency-safety documentation to RegionLimits explaining the
optimistic double-check locking pattern used by all admission paths,
and 15 formal tests covering closed-region rejection across all
lifecycle states, idempotent add, remove+re-admit slot recovery,
unlimited limits, saturating_sub safety, error field accuracy,
has_live_work integration, heap boundary admission, and interleaved
add/remove cycle invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
